name: octo-oke-error-saturation
displayName: OCTO OKE — error / saturation top-N pods (slow + errored spans)
description: Top-N pods by error count or slow-span count (duration > 1000ms) during the stress window. Highlights which HPA-added pod (or which baseline pod) is bottlenecked or returning span.status=ERROR. Pairs with the Phase 7 High-CPU-saturation OCI Monitoring alarm.
queryString: service.namespace = 'octo_apm_demo' and (span.status = 'ERROR' or duration > 1000ms) | stats count() as span_count by service.name, k8s.pod.name, span.status | sort -span_count | head limit = 50

external_drilldowns.name: Grafana
external_drilldowns.why: Cluster-side saturation view (node CPU, memory pressure) for the same time slice.

external_drilldowns.name: Langfuse / LLMetry
external_drilldowns.why: Investigate LLM-driven span latency when GenAI is in the slow path.

external_drilldowns.name: OpenLIT
external_drilldowns.why: OTel-native LLM trace view for errored spans.

external_drilldowns.name: Phoenix
external_drilldowns.why: AI evaluation panel for failed GenAI calls in the stress window.
